info.title: SolHunt Wallet Intelligence
info.description: Solana wallet health analysis and SOL recovery. Check wallet efficiency, find recoverable SOL from zero-balance token accounts, and build trustless recovery transactions. SolHunt never requires custody of your keys.

get.summary: Analyze wallet health and find recoverable SOL
get.description: Analyzes a Solana wallet for recoverable SOL locked in zero-balance token accounts. Returns health score (0-100), exact recoverable SOL amount, number of closeable accounts, and cleanup recommendations. Health grades: A (80-100), B (60-79), C (40-59), D (20-39), F (0-19).

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Solana wallet public key (base58 encoded, 32-44 characters)

get.summary: Get specific token accounts to close for SOL recovery
get.description: Returns a prioritized list of specific token accounts to close for maximum SOL recovery. Accounts are sorted by batch group for efficient transaction building.

get.summary: Preview exactly what a recovery will do before executing
get.description: Preview exactly what a wallet recovery will do before executing. Returns accounts that will be closed, exact SOL you will receive, exact fee SolHunt takes (15%), net amount to your wallet, and estimated transaction cost.

parameters.name: max_accounts
parameters.description: Maximum accounts to include in preview

post.summary: Build unsigned Solana transaction for wallet recovery
post.description: Build unsigned Solana transaction bytes for wallet recovery. Returns base64-encoded unsigned transaction(s) ready for signing. The user signs with their own wallet — SolHunt never has custody. Each transaction includes closeAccount instructions AND a 15% fee transfer to SolHunt built atomically.

destination_wallet.description: Where to send recovered SOL (can be same wallet)
